title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
mode: build-along · delegated build (teach-me specs → build-me builds)

lifecycleNotes.scaffolded: lesson folder copied from _template/; checklist + raw-notes exist
lifecycleNotes.taught: Socratic session complete; every checklist item demonstrated
lifecycleNotes.spec'd: HANDOFF.md written for the build tool (delegated builds only)
lifecycleNotes.built: build-me implemented it; POST_BUILD_HANDOFF.md returned + STATE.md updated
lifecycleNotes.decked: deck.html (built FROM _template/deck.html) + guide.md produced, folding in build findings

gates: deck.html MUST be built FROM topics/_template/deck.html (do not hand-roll or copy another lesson's deck)
deck.html + guide.md are produced AFTER the build returns, so they can fold in POST_BUILD findings
a lesson is 'done' only when every artifact in its `artifacts` map is true AND verified to exist on disk

cursor.nextAction: start 104 via /teach-me: hybrid retrieval (dense + BM25/sparse, RRF fusion). Concrete 'before' = the surviving #2 Deep Gnome / Giants intruders from the 103 build run.

lessons.title: Foundations & the design space
lessons.buildIncrement: Scaffold the-stacks v2 (TS) as a walking skeleton: real interfaces, dumb-but-real bodies, runs end-to-end.
lessons.motivator: RAG is a pipeline of decisions; retrieval is the ceiling; evidence beats folk wisdom.
lessons.feedsForward: Stable interfaces every later lesson swaps behind; baseline MRR ≈ 0.33 on the goblin query for 107.
decisions: walking skeleton over stubs (107 needs a runnable baseline)
gotchas: the 'idempotent re-ingest' claim made here was later found false in 102

lessons.title: Ingestion: HTML → chunks
lessons.deckGuideNote: BACKFILLED 2026-06-24 — build was done earlier but the deck/guide pass never fired (the drift this tracker now prevents).
lessons.buildIncrement: Structure-aware chunking (one chunk per heading section, size guard sub-split/merge, atomic stat-block divs kept whole) + metadata sidecar (source, breadcrumbs[], chunkId, kind).
lessons.motivator: Fixed-size windows split across monster boundaries → polluted embeddings + citations.
lessons.feedsForward: Clean per-monster chunks; meta bag populated so 104 hybrid needs no schema reshape; breadcrumbs double as citation + filter key.
decisions: chunk = smallest unit holding a whole answer
size is a guard not a rule (tune in 107)
structure-aware over semantic chunking (cheaper, fits templated corpus)
gotchas: DDB has ZERO <table> elements — stat blocks are div.stat-block-background (spec's 'keep tables whole' framing was wrong)
vec0 ignores INSERT OR REPLACE → 101's re-ingest actually crashed; fixed with DELETE-then-INSERT in store.ts
102 fixed chunk CONTENT not neighbor RANKING — that's 103 (clean split of blame)

lessons.title: Embeddings + vector store
lessons.buildIncrement: Swapped HashingEmbedder → OllamaEmbedder (nomic-embed-text, 768-dim, local, L2-normalized) behind the unchanged Embedder interface; activated Ollama in docker-compose + bootstrap pull; dim 256→768 forced wipe + re-ingest. Kept brute-force sqlite-vec (no ANN); corrected the ANN docstring.
lessons.motivator: Clean chunks (from 102) but neighbors still mis-ranked (Grimlock/Gith at #2/#3) — an embedding artifact. MRR ≈ 0.33.
lessons.feedsForward: VERIFIED: real semantic ranking → Goblins #1 (0.586, clearly ahead), Goblin Boss #3, Goblin #4; MRR 0.33→1.0; Grimlock/Gith gone from top 12. Surviving #2 Deep Gnome + Giants cluster (lexical/identifier gap) = 104 hybrid's concrete 'before'. Embedding cost baseline: ~10s / 48 chunks (~200ms/chunk, batched) for 107.
decisions: nomic-embed-text (768) local via Ollama: cost/privacy/repeatability over hosted quality ceiling
OllamaEmbedder MUST L2-normalize (store ranks by L2; normalize → cosine-equivalent — applies the unit-sphere lesson)
keep brute-force exact KNN — right at our scale; Store stays swappable
no nomic task-prefixes — confirmed unnecessary live (bare model cleared the AC); kept symmetric Embedder interface, deferred prefixes to 107
gotchas: BUILD CONFIRMED LIVE + RESOLVED: stale 256-dim stacks.db + CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS silently keeps old dim → 768-dim insert dies 'Dimension mismatch' mid-transaction. FIX (return leg, author-approved): store.init() now reads the existing vec_chunks dim from sqlite_master and throws a clear 'wipe + re-ingest' error (NOT auto-wipe) before any work. Author should fold this guard back into the lesson source + HANDOFF §5.
scores are compressed (0.52–0.59) on this homogeneous 48-monster corpus — ordering carries the signal, not gaps; good 'why normalize' teaching slide
surviving intruders are semantically HONEST (Deep Gnome/Giants all 'live underground') — the synonym win working, not a bug; it's the lexical gap, not a ranking failure
store.ts ANN→exact-KNN docstring corrected (done); demo query canonicalized to 'goblins live in?' (done)
openThreads: RESOLVED in return leg: store.init() dim-mismatch guard added (fail-loud, no auto-wipe) — reflect into lesson source + HANDOFF §5
before/after MRR (0.33→1.0) is the concrete 107 story — now real

lessons.title: Retrieval: dense vs sparse vs hybrid
lessons.buildIncrement: Add sparse (BM25) alongside dense; fuse with RRF behind the Retriever interface (HybridRetriever).
lessons.motivator: Semantic search dilutes exact identifiers (e.g. 'Tasha's Hideous Laughter') — the mirror-image of dense's strength.
decisions: populate rawText/meta richly (columns already exist — no migration)

lessons.title: Reranking
lessons.buildIncrement: Rerank stage over top-K (cross-encoder / hosted) behind the Reranker interface.
lessons.motivator: Over-fetch then trim: a sharper model re-scores the K candidates the fast retriever returned.
decisions: TS friction → hosted rerank API or transformers.js

lessons.title: Generation + routing
lessons.buildIncrement: End-to-end cited answers; interrogate the-stacks' wiki-routing (pre- vs post-filter) against the evidence.
lessons.motivator: Context assembly + does routing earn its keep vs hybrid+rerank?
lessons.feedsForward: A working product to evaluate (107) and harden (108).

lessons.title: Evaluation
lessons.buildIncrement: D&D eval set + harness; re-implement Ragas metrics in TS; measure retriever and generator independently.
lessons.motivator: Magic numbers are folk wisdom — measure on your own corpus.
lessons.feedsForward: Tune the guard numbers deferred since 102; baseline MRR 0.33 → target 1.0 story.

lessons.title: Failure modes & hardening (capstone)
lessons.buildIncrement: Harden the working product against Barnett's 7 failure points / 4 categories; debugging playbook.
lessons.motivator: Retrieval errors cascade; out-of-corpus queries must abstain gracefully.

parked: Agentic / iterative retrieval (multi-hop) — Ragas is single-shot
Graph/structured retrieval over D&D entities (typed fields + normalized monster DB)
